notes: The game starts up, but the game feels very slow from the beginning. Sound is stuttering in the cutscenes, but seems ok in the gameplay. Because of the slowness of the game the gameplay is slow and cluncky. With patience the game is somewhat playable.
title: Ghost Pirates of Vooju Island

notes: It works well, in Set Launch Options add PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%
title: Ghost Pirates of Vooju Island
